name: Pat's Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Pat Brooks
Oven: 300°F for cookies; 275°F for large whole shortbread
Cream butter until light. Add sugar gradually, beating until fluffy. Add flour 1/2 cup at a time to a total of 2 cups, mixing well. Turn dough out onto a pastry board floured with the final 1/4 cup flour. Knead in this last 1/4 cup, then divide the dough into two and knead each until all cracks disappear (about 5 minutes). Refrigerate for 15 to 20 minutes.
Roll out each piece to 3/8 inch thickness. Cut into desired shapes or leave whole and crimp edges and prick surfaces with a fork. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet to slightly golden, 25 to 30 minutes for cookies and 30 to 35 minutes for whole shortbread.
